short_blurb: Expert roofing for Woodland Hills homes, hillside properties, and commercial buildings.
local_note: Woodland Hills is a fire-adjacent community with many homes in Very High Fire Hazard Severity Zones near the Santa Monica Mountains. We specialize in Chapter 7A-compliant roofing — Class A systems, ember-resistant venting, and metal drip edge — that protect against ember intrusion. The Warner Center commercial corridor also keeps us busy with flat-roof TPO and modified bitumen work on office and retail buildings.

faqs.q: Is Woodland Hills in a fire hazard zone?
faqs.a: Many Woodland Hills neighborhoods bordering the Santa Monica Mountains are in Very High Fire Hazard Severity Zones. We install Class A rated roofing systems and can walk you through the Chapter 7A requirements that apply to your address.
